CustomField.formula:
If(BEGINS(Website__c , "www."), IF(FIND('/', MID(Website__c, 5, LEN(Website__c) - 4)) != 0, MID(Website__c, 5, FIND('/', MID(Website__c, 5, LEN(Website__c) - 4)) -1), MID(Website__c, 5, LEN(Website__c) - 4)),
If(BEGINS(Website__c, "http://www."), IF(FIND('/', MID(Website__c, 12, LEN(Website__c) - 11)) != 0,MID(Website__c, 12, FIND('/', MID(Website__c,12,LEN(Website__c) - 11)) -1), MID(Website__c,12,LEN(Website__c)-11)),
If(BEGINS(Website__c, "https://www."), IF(FIND('/', MID(Website__c, 13, LEN(Website__c) - 12)) != 0,MID(Website__c, 13, FIND('/', MID(Website__c,13,LEN(Website__c) - 12)) -1), MID(Website__c,13,LEN(Website__c)-12)),
If(BEGINS(Website__c, "http://"), IF(FIND('/', MID(Website__c, 8, LEN(Website__c) - 7)) != 0,MID(Website__c, 8, FIND('/', MID(Website__c,8,LEN(Website__c) - 7)) -1), MID(Website__c,8,LEN(Website__c)-7)),
If(BEGINS(Website__c, "https://"), IF(FIND('/', MID(Website__c, 9, LEN(Website__c) - 8)) != 0,MID(Website__c, 9, FIND('/', MID(Website__c,9,LEN(Website__c) - 8)) -1), MID(Website__c,9,LEN(Website__c)-8)),
IF(FIND('/',MID(Website__c, 1, LEN(Website__c))) !=0,MID(Website__c,1,FIND('/', Website__c) - 1), Website__c ))))))
CustomField.label: Website Domain
